name: Spinach with Pine Nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash spinach well and drain. Cut into coarse shreds.
2. Plunge the shredded spinach into boiling water for about 30 seconds, then drain immediately.
3. Heat 2 tablespoons of unsalted butter and olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
4. Add minced garlic and cayenne pepper to taste. Cook for 2-3 minutes until fragrant.
5. Add raisins and pine nuts. Cook for an additional 2 minutes.
6. Mix the cooked ingredients into the spinach until well combined.
7. Arrange the mixture on a hot, flat ovenproof dish.
8. Sprinkle parmesan cheese evenly over the top.
9. Melt the remaining butter in the pan and pour it over the cheese.
10. Place under a preheated broiler for 1-2 minutes, or until the cheese is lightly browned and bubbly.
